title: Multilingual conversation — English, Japanese, Arabic, Hebrew

messages.content: Please say hello in several languages.

Here are greetings in four languages:

English: Hello
Japanese: 「こんにちは」
Arabic: مرحبا
Hebrew: שלום
「こんにちは」 — how do you write that in romaji?
「こんにちは」 in romaji is "Konnichiwa". The brackets 「」 are Japanese quotation marks (called 鉤括弧, kagikakko).
